## Runtime.Indexers.RecipesByCategoryIndexer.getAllCategories() method

Gets all categories that have at least one recipe. Note: Forces index build if not already built.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getAllCategories(): ReadonlyArray<RecipeCategory>;
```
**Returns:**
